terminology.disambiguation: An ILO is an instructional concept targeted by tasks in the Decision Tree curriculum. It is not a SCORM Learning Object (content package) and not a UNESCO AI-CFT competency identifier (LO3.x).
terminology.aicft_competency_note: Portfolio competency codes (LO3.1.1, LO3.2.2, etc.) are interpreted at the AI-CFT layer after Domain Understanding synthesis. ILOs bridge Observable Behaviours to Domain Understanding.

ILO_INSTANCE.title: Supervised learning instance (object)
ILO_INSTANCE.description: A single case or row to be classified, comprising feature values and an optional or inferred class label.
ILO_INSTANCE.instructional_purpose: Anchor vocabulary for what is being predicted and what evidence is observed per case before tree reasoning begins.

ILO_FEATURE.title: Feature (predictor attribute)
ILO_FEATURE.description: An input attribute used by a decision tree to split or classify instances.
ILO_FEATURE.instructional_purpose: Establish what model inputs are and how they differ from labels or outcomes.

ILO_LABEL.title: Class label (target)
ILO_LABEL.description: The categorical outcome a decision tree predicts for each instance.
ILO_LABEL.instructional_purpose: Distinguish what is predicted from features used for prediction during instruction.

ILO_DATASET.title: Labeled dataset
ILO_DATASET.description: A collection of instances with features and labels used to build or evaluate a decision tree.
ILO_DATASET.instructional_purpose: Connect supervised learning to concrete collections of cases used in classroom tasks.

ILO_TRAINING_ROLE.title: Role of training data in learning
ILO_TRAINING_ROLE.description: How labeled examples enable a model to learn patterns rather than merely store answers.
ILO_TRAINING_ROLE.instructional_purpose: Support explanations of why data are required before tool operation or threshold tuning.

ILO_THRESHOLD.title: Threshold (split cutoff)
ILO_THRESHOLD.description: A numeric or categorical cutoff on a feature that partitions instances at a node.
ILO_THRESHOLD.instructional_purpose: Target threshold application, comparison, and tuning tasks across modalities.

ILO_RULE.title: Decision rule (if-then condition)
ILO_RULE.description: An explicit conditional statement linking feature tests to class assignments along a path.
ILO_RULE.instructional_purpose: Translate between graphical tree paths and verbal or symbolic rules in instruction.

ILO_DECISION_TREE.title: Decision tree structure
ILO_DECISION_TREE.description: A hierarchical model of nested feature tests leading to class outcomes at leaves.
ILO_DECISION_TREE.instructional_purpose: Unify instruction on tree representation, traversal, and construction across modalities.

ILO_TREE_SPLIT.title: Node split (feature and cutoff at a node)
ILO_TREE_SPLIT.description: A structural decision selecting which feature and threshold define a branch at a tree node.
ILO_TREE_SPLIT.instructional_purpose: Separate root and inner-node split decisions from single-threshold classification drills.

ILO_CLASSIFICATION.title: Classification outcome
ILO_CLASSIFICATION.description: Assigning a class label to an instance using a rule, threshold, or tree path.
ILO_CLASSIFICATION.instructional_purpose: Focus instruction on executable classification, not terminology recall alone.

ILO_DT_WORKFLOW.title: Decision-tree construction workflow
ILO_DT_WORKFLOW.description: The ordered instructional pipeline from feature selection through threshold finding to classification.
ILO_DT_WORKFLOW.instructional_purpose: Teach procedural sequencing distinct from isolated vocabulary or single-step application items.

ILO_CONFUSION_MATRIX.title: Confusion matrix
ILO_CONFUSION_MATRIX.description: A tabulation of true positives, false positives, false negatives, and true negatives for a classifier.
ILO_CONFUSION_MATRIX.instructional_purpose: Ground metric instruction and error-type reasoning in a shared representational format.

ILO_MCR.title: Misclassification rate (MCR)
ILO_MCR.description: The proportion of incorrect classifications, typically derived from confusion-matrix counts.
ILO_MCR.instructional_purpose: Support both definitional knowledge and performance comparison tasks involving error rate.

ILO_SENSITIVITY.title: Sensitivity (true positive rate)
ILO_SENSITIVITY.description: The proportion of actual positives correctly identified by the model.
ILO_SENSITIVITY.instructional_purpose: Enable instruction on recall-oriented performance and trade-offs with other error types.

ILO_DATA_PATTERN.title: Data pattern for class separation
ILO_DATA_PATTERN.description: Observable distribution or graph patterns that suggest a feature separates classes.
ILO_DATA_PATTERN.instructional_purpose: Link exploratory data analysis to evidence-based feature hypotheses before modeling.

ILO_FEATURE_SELECTION.title: Feature selection for splitting
ILO_FEATURE_SELECTION.description: Choosing which feature should serve as a split based on data evidence or task criteria.
ILO_FEATURE_SELECTION.instructional_purpose: Target strategic model-design decisions during tree construction and data exploration.

ILO_PARAMETER_OPTIMIZATION.title: Parameter search and optimization
ILO_PARAMETER_OPTIMIZATION.description: Systematic exploration and selection of thresholds or parameters to improve model performance.
ILO_PARAMETER_OPTIMIZATION.instructional_purpose: Organize instruction on iterative tuning in tables and interactive tools.

ILO_MODEL_EVALUATION.title: Model evaluation and interpretation
ILO_MODEL_EVALUATION.description: Using performance evidence and feedback to interpret how well a decision tree or threshold choice works.
ILO_MODEL_EVALUATION.instructional_purpose: Integrate metric literacy, comparison, justification, and feedback interpretation in applied tasks.

ILO_MODEL_LIMITATION.title: Model limitation and uncertainty
ILO_MODEL_LIMITATION.description: Limits of a decision tree, imperfect classification, overfitting risk, or residual uncertainty in predictions.
ILO_MODEL_LIMITATION.instructional_purpose: Teach critical interpretation of model limits without assuming correct execution.

ILO_METACOGNITIVE_REFLECTION.title: Metacognitive reflection on decision-tree learning
ILO_METACOGNITIVE_REFLECTION.description: Articulated awareness of what was learned, misunderstood, or remains uncertain about decision-tree concepts.
ILO_METACOGNITIVE_REFLECTION.instructional_purpose: Support reflective tasks without conflating reflection quality with procedural or strategic mastery.

ILO_PRIOR_BELIEF.title: Uninformed prior belief (diagnostic)
ILO_PRIOR_BELIEF.description: A learner's initial prediction or feature hypothesis before structured evidence is collected.
ILO_PRIOR_BELIEF.instructional_purpose: Capture baseline beliefs for growth measurement; excluded from mastery aggregation.
